title: TC-01: should auto-select FTS default column on first search with no pinned columns
verifies: Running a search with no pinned columns auto-promotes the best-fill FTS field as the default visible column and hides the generic source column

title: TC-02: should preserve user-pinned columns across searches after explicit field add
verifies: After an explicit user field add, isFtsDefaultColumn is cleared and the user's column selection persists across subsequent searches without FTS re-resolution

title: TC-03: should re-resolve FTS default on new search when system pick is still active
verifies: When the current columns are still a system pick (isFtsDefaultColumn stays true), a subsequent search re-evaluates the best FTS column from new results

title: TC-04: should skip FTS default when SQL mode is enabled
verifies: Toggling SQL mode ON skips the FTS default logic entirely; the previously auto-picked FTS column is not injected into SQL query results

title: TC-05: should clear FTS default on stream change
verifies: Switching streams clears isFtsDefaultColumn and selectedFields so the previous stream's FTS auto-pick does not carry over to the new stream

title: TC-06: should trigger fresh auto-pick after resetting fields
verifies: Clicking Reset Fields clears all selected fields and sets isFtsDefaultColumn=false; the next search triggers a fresh FTS auto-pick

title: TC-07: should trigger fresh auto-pick after removing column via table header close button
verifies: Removing the system-picked column via the table-header close button clears isFtsDefaultColumn; an empty selection on the next search triggers a fresh auto-pick

title: TC-08: should NOT persist system-picked column to localStorage
verifies: The auto-picked FTS field is visible in the table but NOT persisted to logFilterField in localStorage; only explicit user picks are persisted

title: TC-09: should fall back to source column when no FTS candidates available
verifies: When a stream has no FTS candidates, resolveDefaultColumns returns empty and the system falls back to rendering the generic source column

title: TC-10: should replace system pick with saved-view columns on apply
verifies: Applying a saved view clears isFtsDefaultColumn and the saved view's stored columns take precedence over any prior system pick
